decks.notes: The deck focuses on filling your graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then using Replenish to bring them all back into play. This combo is supported by cards like Parallax Tide and Parallax Wave to control the board and Opalescence to turn your enchantments into powerful creatures. The deck also includes interaction and disruption in the form of Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing. The key strategy is to quickly set up the combo and overwhelm your opponent with a board full of enchanted creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to use the Replenish card to bring back powerful enchantments from the graveyard such as Opalescence, Parallax Tide, and Parallax Wave. By utilizing cards like Attunement and Intuition to fill the graveyard with enchantments, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence. Additionally, cards like Tsabo's Web and Seal of Cleansing provide control and disruption against the opponent's strategies. With the right sequencing and card advantage, this combo-centric deck has the potential to quickly take control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the Enchantress card draw engine to quickly build up resources while controlling the game with powerful enchantments such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave. The deck aims to generate massive amounts of mana with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum in order to win the game with a game-ending combo like Worship or Replenish. It also has a strong defensive plan with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Solitary Confinement to protect itself while setting up its win conditions.

The deck focuses on utilizing the madness mechanic to quickly drop powerful creatures onto the board by discarding cards. By utilizing cards like Basking Rootwalla, Wild Mongrel, and Arrogant Wurm, the deck can apply early pressure and overwhelm opponents. The combination of Madness cards and counter spells like Circular Logic and Mana Leak helps to control the game and protect its creatures. The deck also features survival of the fittest to help search for key creatures while maintaining a solid mana base with a mix of lands.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence with enchantments and ramp cards, while drawing a ton of cards with Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. The deck also utilizes powerful enchantments like Opalescence to turn all enchantments into creatures and overwhelm the opponent. The combo potential with cards like Parallax Wave and Replenish allows for powerful plays that can secure a win. Overall, the deck focuses on using enchantments to control the game and set up a game-winning combo.

The main concept of this deck is to flood the board with aggressive Goblin creatures and overwhelm the opponent quickly. Using cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat out creatures early, and support cards like Goblin Warchief to make them more powerful, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and deal damage efficiently. Cards like Lightning Bolt and Pyrokinesis provide removal options, while Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Goon offer late-game reach and finishers. The deck is designed to be fast, proactive, and relentless in its strategy to win the game quickly.

The archetype of this deck is focused on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back into play using reanimation spells such as Reanimate, Exhume, and Animate Dead. The key strategy is to use cards like Putrid Imp and Careful Study to discard big creatures like Phantom Nishoba and Akroma, Angel of Wrath, then bring them back into play for a powerful and explosive win condition. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to help cast the reanimation spells quickly.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through countering spells and board control. It utilizes a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land disruption to slow down the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes card draw spells to maintain card advantage and find key pieces. It can eventually win through creature beatdown with cards like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, or by utilizing cards like Parallax Tide to lock down the opponent's board. The deck aims to control the game until it can secure a victory.

This deck focuses on slowing down the opponent's ability to play spells and control the board through a variety of prison-style tactics. By utilizing cards like Smokestack, Winter Orb, and Tangle Wire, the deck aims to restrict the opponent's resources while generating its own advantage through artifacts like Metalworker and Mind Stone. By creating a taxing and oppressive environment for the opponent, the deck aims to grind out victories through attrition and resource denial. Additionally, it includes creatures like Karn, Silver Golem and Masticore to provide additional threats and utility in disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to efficiently ramp up mana using enchantments like Wild Growth and Exploration, while drawing cards and controlling the board with cards like Enchantress's Presence and Parallax Wave. The goal is to establish a strong board presence with Opalescence turning enchantments into creatures, eventually setting up for a game-winning play with Replenish to bring back all enchantments from the graveyard. The deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent through a combination of card advantage and resilient enchantment-based threats.

The primary focus of this deck is to control the game through countering spells, removing threats, and utilizing land denial strategies. With a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Dust Bowl, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and stall the game until it can win with cards like Decree of Justice or chip away at the opponent's life total with creatures. By managing the battlefield and controlling the opponent's options, the deck can slowly gain an advantage and secure the victory.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By using cards like Dark Ritual to accelerate mana and Duress to disrupt the opponent's hand, this deck aims to quickly deploy threats like Carnophage and Dauthi Slayer to apply pressure. The inclusion of Cursed Scroll and Smother provides additional removal options, while cards like Bad Moon and Sarcomancy boost the power of the creatures in this Mono Black Aggro deck.

The deck focuses on utilizing the powerful combo of Replenish and various enchantments such as Opalescence, Parallax Tide, and Parallax Wave to control the board and overwhelm the opponent. Frantic Search and Intuition are used to dig for key combo pieces, while Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provide removal and disruption. Tsabo's Web helps to slow down the opponent's mana development. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces to create a dominating board presence and win the game before the opponent has a chance to recover.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards like Ball Lightning, Grim Lavamancer, and Lightning Bolt, alongside Seal of Fire and Sulfuric Vortex, the goal is to keep the pressure on the opponent while dealing direct damage to their life total. The inclusion of cards like Urza's Bauble and Cursed Scroll help provide card advantage and additional ways to close out the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through hand disruption (Cabtal Therapy, Duress), creature removal (Bone Shredder, Nantuko Vigilante), and card advantage (Graveborn Muse, Withered Wretch). The deck utilizes Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures and maintain board presence. Additionally, the deck includes creatures with powerful abilities (Spike Feeder, Deranged Hermit) to outvalue the opponent. The mana base is designed to provide consistent access to all colors needed for the deck's spells and creatures. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish board control through aggressive creatures like Terravore and Meddling Mage, while also utilizing land destruction like Armageddon to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruption spells, while also gaining card advantage with cards like Sylvan Library. This deck is designed to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain control of the board throughout the game.
